title: デビュー戦の後に・ビッグな新人

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Due her sheer size and strength, Hishi Akebono
leaves quite an impression on the public.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She comes up with two ways to make her races
even more satisfying for everyone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wants to become even more powerful and
really rev up the fans. In other words, she wants
as many people as possible to know about her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To meet her goals, we keep training hard while
finding ways to draw in more fans!
